channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bitcoin is slumping heading into the payrolls report
Tariff bill in U.S. states hits $200 billion as affordability and Trump head into midterms showdown
item.description: New data shows that states where key midterm elections races will take place paid over $134 billion in tariffs during 2025 as affordability issues mou...

item.title: The median amount American workers have saved for retirement is $955
S&P 500 makes history â and in doing so suggests more wild swings ahead
GOP defectors help spike House measure to block tariff disapproval votes
item.description: The House on Tuesday voted against language that would have blocked challenges to Trump's tariffs through the summer.

item.title: DC grand jury declines to indict Sens. Kelly, Slotkin for seditious conspiracy: MS Now
item.description: President Donald Trump had blasted six Democrats in Congress for a video reminding American military service members of their right to refuse illegal ...

item.title: Super Bowl LX and Bad Bunny draw huge ratings, but fall short of records
SAVE Act voter ID bill is on the minds of Trump and Congress: What to know
item.description: A bill that would make it harder to vote in federal elections is a Republican focus this week, with President Donald Trump calling for enacting the SA...

item.title: Senate Leader Thune throws cold water on filibuster change in push for voter-ID bill
item.description: Voter ID legislation backed by President Donald Trump and his GOP allies faces an uphill climb in the Senate.

item.title: Why the S&P 500 still canât manage to close above 7,000
